Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, And For Deemed Admissions, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES C. WARD OF THE LAW OFFICES OF ROGER L. MEREDITH, TEL. NO. 616-5959 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JEFF GRIFFITHS, TEL. NO. (219) 688-7791, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF ROGER MEREDITH'S MOTION To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, And For Deemed Admissions, And For Sanctions IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. DEFENDANT, JEFF GRIFFITH'S OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NOS. 2.2, 2,5, 2.7, 12.1, 12.3 15.1, 17.1, 50.1 & 50.2 ARE OVERRULED AND DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO MAKE FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO EACH OF THESE FORM INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS. 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 3, 6, 10 & 12 DO NOT COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE APPLICABLE PROVISIONS OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE EITHER AN ADMISSION, OR IF HE CONTINUES TO EITHER DENY OR CLAIM AN INABILITY TO EITHER ADMIT OR DENY, HE WILL PROVIDE ALL OF THE INFORMATION REQUIRED UNDER FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1 AS TO WHY HE IS UNABLE TO ADMIT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION ATTACHMENT 2 ARE OVERRULED AND DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER RESPONSES TO EACH OF THE REQUESTS 1-25 WITH EITHER AN ADMISSION OR A DENIAL AND IF NOT AN ADMISSION PROVIDE THE INFORMATION REQUIRED UNDER FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1. IF DEFENDANTS FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER AS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THIS ORDER, ALL SUCH REQUESTS WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND THE GENUINENESS OF THE DOCUMENTS REFERENCED IN ATTACHMENT 2 WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED. MONTEREY SANCTIONS WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT JEFF GRIFFITHS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,351.50 AND WILL BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF WITH 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER WITHIN THE 10 DAYS SPECIFIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Paul Renne, Judge Pro-Tem, Cynthia Herbert, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
